exercises.title: Adaptive Shot Allocation
exercises.description: Implement adaptive shot allocation based on variance.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def adaptive_shots(var_history, base=100, max_shots=5000):
    # Your code
    pass

variances = [0.5, 0.4, 0.3, 0.2, 0.1]
for v in variances:
    shots = adaptive_shots([v])
    print(f"Var={v}: shots={shots}")

exercises.title: Noisy Gradient Averaging
exercises.description: Implement gradient averaging for noise reduction.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def averaged_gradient(grad_fn, params, k=5):
    # Your code
    pass

def noisy_grad(p): return np.array([1.0, 2.0]) + 0.5*np.random.randn(2)
params = np.array([0.0, 0.0])
grad = averaged_gradient(noisy_grad, params, k=10)
print(f"Averaged gradient: {grad}")
